title.en: 5 Site Visits to Solve a "Mystery" Seizure: The -45°C Liquid Trap
title.zh: 5次现场排查：终结 -45°C 液击"悬案"

excerpt.en:
Initial Diagnosis: Multiple large compressors seized and were initially blamed on manufacturing defects.

Root Cause: After 5 site inspections, I traced the root cause not to the machine, but to the system: incidental liquid slugging caused by a flawed -45°C evaporator design.

Resolution: We fixed the system, saving the compressors.
excerpt.zh:
初步诊断：多台大型压缩机抱死，最初被归咎于制造缺陷。

根因分析：经过 5 次现场检查，根因并非机器本身，而是系统：由有缺陷的 -45°C 蒸发器设计导致的偶发性液击。

解决方案：修复系统后，压缩机得以保全。
